 Operations Research (O.R.) is the backbone of many real-world decision systems like routing, scheduling, planning, pricing, and resource allocation. It has delivered value for decades. So why hasn’t it seen the same hype, investment, or widespread adoption as machine learning and AI?

results.title: Thiago Milagres
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist @ Bunge | MSc Computer Science
...
Senior Data Scientist at [Bunge](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bunge)
...
Data Scientist with over seven years of experience specializing in diverse methodologies ranging from time-series analysis, optimization under uncertainty, statistical analysis, and use of machine learning techniques for regression, classification and image and video analysis. I've applied these skills across various sectors, including retail, finance, tech, and electrical energy. Currently, I'm a senior data scientist at a flourishing social media monitoring startup. My journey also encompasses roles as a university lecturer at PUC-Rio, a consultant in the field of data science with Kogno, and contributor in several projects such as COVID19Analytics. I hold a Master's degree on Computer Science with an emphasis on data science applications and optimization under uncertainty. Extensive experience with programming in R, Python, and Julia for tasks related to machine learning, statistics, optimization, and data science in general, backed by a solid theoretical foundation in mathematics, statistics and algorithm design. Proven ability to swiftly develop applications and dashboards using Python (Flask) and JavaScript (React). Familiar with various database management systems, such as ElasticSearch and PostgreSQL. Working knowledge of HTML and CSS.
...
### Senior Data Scientist at [Bunge](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bunge) (Current)
...
Part of the core team at Vox Radar, a social media monitoring start-up, offering a SaaS product used by clients to monitor real-time topics such as politics, sports, marketing campaign outcomes, and more across various social media platforms and news outlets. As a Senior Data Scientist, I am one of the leaders in the data science division, overseeing the use of all statistical and machine learning algorithms within the company. These algorithms are used for a variety of purposes, including natural language processing (NLP), face and object detection in images and videos, sentiment analysis, applications of recent AI technologies for summarizing and classifying posts, as well as statistical modeling to identify potential disruptive growth of certain topics in real-time. I have contributed to projects for clients such as Lojas Americanas, CNN, Ambev, and Energisa. Vox Radar has received considerable media attention in Brazil for its comprehensive data analysis studies, published in renowned newspapers. On a recent project, we collaborated with a prominent financial asset management firm in Brazil to leverage Twitter and news data, significantly improving on the models previously available to forecast Brazilian inflation. Our advanced methodologies were documented in a working paper called "What do news and social media tell us about future inflation?", of which I was a co-author. I presented our findings at both the "Fourth Brazilian Meeting of Data Science," hosted by FGV University, São Paulo, and the "Fifth International Workshop in Financial Econometrics." Show less
...
Vox Radar is a IT Services and IT Consulting company. Vox Radar is a company that provides market analysis and artificial intelligence to create more assertive strategies through artificial intelligence. highlights:

### Data Engineer at [Bunge](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bunge) (Current)
...
After the merge with Viterra I transitioned from Trainee to full-time Data Engineer at Bunge. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Key Responsibilities & Contributions
...
- Write and maintain Python ELT data pipelines to fetch business-relevant data.
- Dockerize Python pipelines.
- Data modeling using dbt.
- Orchestrate and schedule pipelines using Apache Airflow.
- Build processing pipelines to fetch weather data and aggregate it using business-provided geometries.
...
Bunge Limited
...
a Food and Beverage Manufacturing company. bunge is a global leader in agribusiness, food, and ingredients, and has an important role to play in using its crop infrastructure to help fuel renewable energy solutions. Bunge Limited employs 12,651 people (+19.5% YoY, +4206 people) and has an annual revenue of $67.2B, founded in 1818. Headquartered in Chesterfield, Missouri, United States, operates in 72 countries (including Brazil, India, Argentina, Netherlands, and Canada). Has a $13.9B market cap. IPO 2001.
...
During my MSc degree, I followed courses to deepen my knowledge of remote sensing and ML/DL, such as "Advanced Earth Observations", "Machine Learning" and "Deep Learning". To strengthen my programming skills, I took "Programming in Python" and "Geo-Scripting". Interested in modeling the Soil Plant Atmosphere Continuum, I also completed Ecohydrology, where we utilized models such as SWAP and WOFOST to estimate water and carbon balances at the soil profile level. To apply these techniques spatially, I did both my thesis and internship to assimilating remote sensing derived leaf area index (LAI) and canopy nitrogen content into WOFOST using the Ensemble Kalman Filter at plot level using Sentinel 2 data and regional level using MODIS data to improve yield and biomass estimation in agricultural systems. Thesis Title: Improving WOFOST biomass and yield simulations: Assimilating leaf area index and canopy nitrogen with the ensemble Kalman filter.
...

results.title: AI Scientist - WorldQuant | Cake
highlights:
AI Scientist - WorldQuant | Cake
...
# AI Scientist
...
## WorldQuant
...
### Job Description
...
WorldQuant develops and deploys systematic financial strategies across a broad range of asset classes and global markets. We seek to produce high-quality predictive signals (alphas) through our proprietary research platform to employ financial strategies focused on market inefficiencies. Our teams work collaboratively to drive the production of alphas and financial strategies – the foundation of a balanced, global investment platform.
...
The Role: We are seeking an exceptionally talented AI Scientist to join the Artificial Intelligence team at WorldQuant. The successful candidate will:
...
- Conduct research in the Machine Learning field to improve multiple aspects of the investment pipeline
- Produce trading or predictive signals using innovative Machine Learning algorithms
- Apply the latest in LLM based agentic technology to develop and test innovative trading signals and algorithms
- Implement signal compression and combination techniques using Machine Learning tools
- Implement state of the art machine learning algorithms
- Design deep learning architectures.
- Develop model frameworks for investment professionals
- Collaborate with portfolio managers and researchers to optimize machine learning algorithms
- Communicate optimally with team members, researchers, and portfolio managers
...
What You’ll Bring:
...
- PhD degree in a quantitative or highly analytical field (e.g., Computer Science, Physics, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field)
- 2+ years of research or work experience applying Machine Learning in innovative ways to complex problems
...
- Graduated at the top of your respective educational program, with excellent problem-solving abilities, insight, and judgment with a strong attention to detail
...
- Demonstrated ability to program. Strong development skills and proficiency in C++, Python, and PyTorch.
...
- Demonstrated science aptitude via record of creativity and inventions. Ability to run experiments and perform statistical inference.
...
- Experience with software development tools and practices, such as version control (e.g., Git), continuous integration, and testing frameworks
...
- Advanced practitioner-level knowledge of statistical inference, machine learning, software solvers, and/or mathematical optimization
...
- Strong communication skills; ability to express complex concepts in simple
...
The Base Pay Range For This Position Is $150,000 - $200,000 USD.
...
, United States
...
West Palm Beach
...
Palm Beach, Florida
...
FinTech / InsurTech
...
WorldQuant 是家全球量化資產管理公司，管理超過 70 億美元的資產。由 Igor Tulchinsky 於 2007 年創立，我們相信人才遍布全球，但機會則非如此，目前擁有超過 1000 名員工、分布在全球 26 個辦公室。我們遵循著有無限洞見可以發掘的原則，試圖更快速地走向未來，WorldQuant 針對國際市場上不同的資產類別建制及應用系統性的金融策略。
...
WorldQuant is a global quantitative asset management firm with over $7 billion in assets under management. Founded in 2007 by Igor Tulchinsky with the belief that talent is global, but opportunity is not, WorldQuant has more than 1,000 employees spread among 26 global offices. WorldQuant seeks to get to the future faster, guided by the principle that there are an infinite number of insights to discover. The firm develops and deploys investment strategies across a variety of asset classes in global markets. For more information on WorldQuant’s philosophy and culture, please visit www.worldquant.com.

highlights:
Binance Accelerator Program - Data Scientist (LLM & Trading) | Hirequorum
...
# Binance Accelerator Program - Data Scientist (LLM & Trading)
...
About Binance Accelerator Program
...
- Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
...
- Leveraging knowledge of financial derivatives, participate in the design and development of a Web3 AI-powered financial token risk control system integrated into a real-world system.
...
Assist in building and maintaining benchmark datasets to evaluate the performance of the AI ​​system, and assist in prototyping and iterating the workflow of the financial AI agent system.
...
Work closely with senior engineers to complete system design, integration, and deployment.
...
Understanding financial derivatives risk measurement, including but not limited to VaR, CVA, FVA, and PFE, to support risk management of interest rate derivatives, credit derivatives, and FX/commodity options.
...
Interested in secondary market trading, with basic programming skills and Python experience.
...
Passionate about artificial intelligence, data-driven systems, and building practical application tools.

# Binance Accelerator Program - Data Scientist (LLM & Trading)
...
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
...
### About the role
...
We are looking for a Golang Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is proficient in Go programming and has a strong background in data-related fields. Experience with data analysis and frontend development will be a plus. You will primarily work on developing and optimizing our rule engine and may also be involved in AI-related projects.
...
- About the role
- We are looking for a Golang Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is proficient in Go programming and has a strong background in data-related fields. Experience with data analysis and frontend development will be a plus. You will primarily work on developing and optimizing our rule engine and may also be involved in AI-related projects.
...
### Responsibilities:
...
- Leveraging knowledge of financial derivatives, participate in the design and development of a Web3 AI-powered financial token risk control system integrated into a real-world system.

- Assist in building and maintaining benchmark datasets to evaluate the performance of the AI ​​system, and assist in prototyping and iterating the workflow of the financial AI agent system.

- Work closely with senior engineers to complete system design, integration, and deployment.
...
### Requirements:
...
- Currently pursuing a degree in finance, fintech, or a related field.

- Understanding financial derivatives risk measurement, including but not limited to VaR, CVA, FVA, and PFE, to support risk management of interest rate derivatives, credit derivatives, and FX/commodity options.

- Interested in secondary market trading, with basic programming skills and Python experience.

- Passionate about artificial intelligence, data-driven systems, and building practical application tools.

- Excellent communication skills and a strong willingness to learn quickly.

- Able to commit at least 6 months, working 5 days a week.
...
